title: AG-UI Protocol
description: 33 typed event categories via ag_ui_ex Hex package. SSE transport, compile-time EventType constants. Full ag_ui_ex dependency — community Elixir SDK contributed to the AG-UI open protocol ecosystem.

title: Event Router
description: Central dispatch: routes AG-UI events to AgentRegistry, FormationStore, Dashboard, Metrics. Compile-time module attributes for pattern matching. Fan-out via PubSub to all subscribed LiveViews.

title: Event Stream
description: Emit and retrieve events. PubSub broadcast to all subscribers. Time-ordered ETS storage with sequence numbers. Clear/filter operations. 12 ExUnit tests covering emit, subscribe, replay, and filter paths.

title: Hook Bridge
description: Translates legacy register/heartbeat/notify into AG-UI event types (RUN_STARTED, STEP_*, TOOL_CALL_*). Zero-config backward compatibility — existing hook scripts gain AG-UI semantics without modification.

title: State Manager
description: Per-agent versioned state with JSON Patch delta emission (STATE_SNAPSHOT / STATE_DELTA). ETS-backed, microsecond reads. Supports get_state/2, put_state/3, apply_delta/3 operations.

title: Agent Registry
description: Lifecycle tracking for all agents. Explicit squadron/swarm/cluster/individual hierarchy. Fire-and-forget registration at POST /api/register. 30s heartbeat, 90s stale threshold. ETS-backed with O(1) lookups.

title: Formation Model
description: Hierarchical agent coordination via FormationStore GenServer. Formation → Squadron → Swarm → Agent → Task hierarchy. Persists completed formations for post-mortem. POST /api/v2/formations with deep-link support.

title: Metrics Collector
description: Per-agent, per-project token economics. 12 x 5-min buckets, full last-hour time-series. GET /api/telemetry returns started/completed/failed/active_now summary. Feeds CCEMAgent AreaMark + LineMark chart.

title: Chat Store
description: Scoped message persistence via ChatStore GenServer. AG-UI TEXT_MESSAGE_START/CONTENT/END event integration. PubSub real-time broadcast. 27 ExUnit tests covering create, list, scope, and clear operations.

title: 19+ LiveView Dashboards
description: Real-time Phoenix LiveView pages: agents, formations, analytics, health, tasks, scanner, actions, skills, notifications, AG-UI events, conversations, ports, UPM Kanban, inspector chat, CCEM overview, docs, showcase. All subscribe to PubSub channels for sub-second updates.

title: Sidebar Navigation
description: Unified sidebar across all 19+ views. Dual-section dynamic nav: system tools and project sections. Active page highlighting with icon labels. UPM nav item injected. Dynamic header branding per section.

title: Notification Panel
description: Tabbed categories with toast overlays. Wave completion toasts with deep-link to formation. Read/unread tracking. APM hook support via POST /api/notify. Richer notification cards with formation context and action buttons.

title: Health Check System
description: HealthCheckRunner with 15-second auto-refresh. Overall status badge aggregating server, APM, and service health. Displayed in sidebar and /health LiveView. Used by CCEMAgent EnvironmentMonitor for menu bar status.

title: AG-UI Dashboard
description: Live AG-UI event viewer at /ag-ui. State inspector with per-agent versioned state display. Protocol stats: event counts by type, rate per minute. SSE streaming via EventStream PubSub. Event type filter using EventType.all/0.

title: Conversation Monitor
description: Real-time conversation tracking across scopes via ChatStore. Message history viewer with TEXT_MESSAGE event replay. Scoped by session, project, or formation. ActivityTracker inference drives ACTIVITY_SNAPSHOT events.

title: CCEMAgent
description: Native macOS menubar companion. Swift/AppKit @Observable architecture. Telemetry AreaMark + LineMark chart (48px). Start/Stop APM via APMServerManager. APMClient v2 with configurable port + SSE. Mini-chat view and multi-server dynamic port config.

title: Skill Health Monitor
description: SkillsRegistryStore GenServer with ETS health scoring cache. Three-tier health view (green/yellow/red). Audit engine via ActionEngine: fix_skill_frontmatter, complete_skill_description, add_skill_triggers, backfill_project_memory. Audit All and individual Fix buttons in /skills LiveView.

title: Project Scanner
description: Auto-discovery of developer directories for projects, stacks, active ports, hooks, MCPs, CLAUDE.md sections. scan_claude_native/1 extracts session state. Configurable scan path via /scanner LiveView. 3s auto-refresh.

title: Background Task Manager
description: BackgroundTasksStore GenServer tracks Claude Code background tasks: name, definition, invoking_process, agent_name, log_path, runtime_ms. PubSub broadcasts on status change. GET /tasks/:id/logs, POST /tasks/:id/stop. 5s auto-refresh in /tasks LiveView.

title: Action Engine
description: ActionEngine GenServer with extensible action catalog: update_hooks, add_memory_pointer, backfill_apm_config, analyze_project, discover_migrate_showcases, register_all_ports, update_port_namespace, analyze_port_assignment, smart_reassign_ports. Async via Task.start/1. Run modal in /actions LiveView.

title: UAT Testing Panel
description: 14 test cases across 6 categories exercising the live AG-UI subsystem in-browser. Tests agent registration, event routing, state management, hook bridge translation, formation tracking, and metrics collection. Results displayed per test with pass/fail and latency.

title: Showcase Generator
description: IP-safe architecture diagrams via ShowcaseDataStore. C4 abstraction levels with redaction engine. Pure SVG diagram engine (replaced Mermaid) — WCAG AA, anime.js node-level animations. LiveView-integrated at /showcase. ShowcaseEngine memory leak fixed (global listener audit).

title: Cross-Platform Installer
description: Modular install.sh with libs: ui, detect, deps, build, hooks, service. Supports --prefix, --skip-*, --dry-run, --yes flags. User-level services only (no sudo). Service templates in installer/services/. Generates launchd plist with io.pegues.agent-j.labs reverse-DNS identifier.

title: UPM Orchestration
description: End-to-end orchestration: /upm plan → /upm build → /upm verify → /upm ship. Formation deployment with squadron/swarm/agent hierarchy. Plane PM bidirectional sync. 22 REST endpoints at /api/upm/*. Wave-gated execution with TypeScript/compile gates. AG-UI event emission for real-time progress. CCEM APM toast notifications at every lifecycle point.

title: OpenAPI 3.0.3 Spec
description: 56 endpoints across 21 categories. Canonical at GET /api/v2/openapi.json. Scalar interactive docs at /api/docs. Validated by integration tests. Formation, UPM, AG-UI, skills, tasks, scanner, actions, ports all documented. Used as OpenAPI-first validation gate after APM startup.

title: Port Management
description: PortsLive intelligence dashboard with conflict visualization and utilization heatmap. ActionEngine port actions: register_all_ports, update_port_namespace, analyze_port_assignment, smart_reassign_ports. Project-scoped assignment, namespace tracking, conflict detection. REST at /api/v2/ports.

title: Approval Gates
description: Formation-level approval workflow. POST /api/v2/approvals/request with approve/reject. Integrates with AG-UI approval event types. Wave-gate blocking until approval received. Used by UPM ship step to require human confirmation before deployment.

title: 5-Level Formation Graph
description: Full D3.js formation tree at /formation: Formation → Squadron → Swarm → Cluster → Agent, 5 nesting levels. Wave swim lanes as background bands grouped by wave_number. Agent type badges (ORCH/LEAD/SWM/CLU) in node top-right. Node color by type (indigo/sky/emerald/violet/slate). Sub-labels show story_id and work_item_title. Inspector panel with all 16 metadata fields on click.

title: Screenshot Skill
description: /screenshot skill handles macOS U+202F narrow no-break space in HEIC filenames via Python os.listdir(). Subcommands: default (last screenshot), last N / last 1h, incremental (skip already-processed), setup (project/user scoped config), status. Auto-converts HEIC→PNG via sips. Processed state persisted to screenshot-processed.json for incremental sessions.

title: Skill Dependency Graph
description: Visualized skill ecosystem for CCEM: /idea → /ralph → /upm → /formation → /deploy:agents-v2 → /live-integration-testing. /ccem-apm as telemetry hub receiving register/heartbeat/event from all agents. /showcase consuming from APM: agent count, formation tree (5 levels), UPM phase, AG-UI event stream. Data flow: prd.json → formation config → APM telemetry → showcase display.

title: AgentLock Authorization
description: 3-layer authorization for every tool invocation: SessionStore (15-min TTL, dual-indexed ETS), PolicyEngine (risk: NONE/LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL, default map), TokenStore (atk_ prefix, SHA-256 param binding, 60s TTL). Fail-open hooks: agentlock_pre_tool.sh, agentlock_post_tool.sh, agentlock_context.sh. 19 REST endpoints at /api/v2/auth/*, 97 ExUnit tests, 0 failures.

title: Trust Ceiling Tracking
description: ContextTracker GenServer: monotonic trust degradation AUTHORITATIVE→DERIVED→UNTRUSTED. 200-event ring buffer per session. PubSub broadcast on agentlock:trust. RedactionEngine: 7 regex patterns (SSN, CC, email, phone, IP, AWS key, API key). MemoryGate: 7 prohibited patterns blocking API keys, PEM, JWT, SSH, OAuth, AWS, connection strings.

title: Authorization LiveView
description: 4-tab dashboard at /authorization: Overview (trust gauge, risk distribution, denial list, rate sparkline), Sessions (table + TTL countdown), Audit Log (filterable, risk badges), Policies (editable tool registry). Routing graph at /routing: D3.js force-directed auth flow, agent→tool edges, approval gate diamonds, audit trail side panel. AuthSupervisor sub-supervisor.

title: UPM Orchestration System
description: Unified Project Management skill orchestrating PRD → Plane PM → Ralph → Formation → Ship. /upm plan generates wave-structured work items in Plane PM; /upm build deploys formation agents per wave via Ralph; /upm ship closes the loop with git + Plane PM sync. All 260 CCEM issues Done across 9 GitHub PRs (8 merged, 1 open).

title: Skill Chain: /upm → /plane-pm
description: When /upm plan runs: creates Plane PM cycles (one per wave), modules (one per domain), issues (one per story). Labels map to story categories. State transitions: Backlog → In Progress → Done on wave completion, ship closure. CCEM project (a20e1d2e) at plane.lgtm.build: 260 issues, 100% Done.

title: Skill Chain: /upm → /ralph
description: When /upm build runs: converts plan to prd.json format, spawns Ralph autonomous agent per wave. Ralph implements stories sequentially — runs mix compile --warnings-as-errors and mix test as gate checks, commits, marks passes:true. Gate failures auto-fix before proceeding. No manual intervention required.

title: Skill Chain: /upm → /formation
description: /formation deploy creates hierarchical agent structure per wave: orchestrator → squadron leads → swarm agents. Every agent registers with APM via POST /api/register (fire-and-forget, fire-and-forget). FormationStore tracks structure in ETS. Formation graphs visualized at /formation. AgentLock AuthSupervisor authorizes each tool call.

title: Skill Chain: /upm → /ship
description: /ship closes the loop: creates PR, pushes branch, marks Plane issues Done with PR URL in comments. 9 total PRs in ccem-apm repo: PR#9 (v7.0.0 AgentLock, merged 2026-03-24), PR#8 (v6.4.0 Skills UX), PR#7 (v5.4.0 AG-UI), PR#5 (v5.1.0 Mgmt Suite), PR#4 (v4.2.0 Dynamic APM), PR#2 (v4.0.0 Formation UX).

title: Plane PM Coalescence
description: CCEM Plane project (a20e1d2e-3139-406e-ae03-dc6d1d8cb995): 260 total issues, 260 Done (100% completion). Related projects: AGUI (3e16b3ea, AG-UI Elixir SDK v0.1.0), CCEM5 (a898419a, AG-UI APM integration). Workspace lgtm at plane.lgtm.build. All waves CP-001 through CP-162 marked Done.

title: GitHub Delivery Record
description: ccem-apm repo (peguesj/ccem-apm): PR#9 v7.0.0 AgentLock merged 2026-03-24 (17 commits, 56 files, 5900 insertions). PR#8 v6.4.0 WCAG AA + Skills UX. PR#7 v5.4.0 AG-UI protocol (48 stories). PR#5 v5.1.0 Management Suite. PR#4 v4.2.0 Dynamic APM. PR#2 v4.0.0 Formation UX. PR#1 v3.x notifications. All 7 worktrees rolled up, branches cleaned, main at 73cad7c.

title: AgentLock Skills Inspector
description: SkillsLive inspector drawer shows AgentLock auth gate status per skill — green Auth Gated badge (hook present + gatable tools detected) or yellow Auth Missing badge with per-tool chips and one-click gating via create_authorization_hooks action.

title: Showcase Scope Pull-tabs
description: All/CCEM/APM/Latest scope filter pill-tabs added to showcase feature card panel. State persisted via localStorage. Filters feature list by project category or latest version.

title: GET /api/notifications/:id
description: New REST endpoint returns single notification with full refs/trace/metadata/actions payload. Backed by AgentRegistry.get_notification/1 via direct ETS lookup.

title: UPM Workflow Deep-link
description: WorkflowLive /workflow/upm gains pill-tab bar: Default (standard UPM diagram) and Current (live UPM phase, active wave/story, stack-specific TSC gate, formation status). UPM category notifications auto-enriched with View Workflow action.

title: Plugin Engine Standard
description: Formal PluginBehaviour v2 with supervisor_children/0, inspector_component/0, default_enabled?/0, on_enable/0, on_disable/0, live_views/0. PluginSupervisor DynamicSupervisor for plugin-owned child processes. 9-plugin default registry.

title: Ralph Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping the Ralph PRD reader — start_loop, stop_loop, status, list_runs actions. Delegates to ApmV5.Ralph for PRD loading and flowchart generation.

title: Formations Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping FormationStore — list, get, create, update, agents actions. Exposes formation CRUD and agent membership queries through the plugin engine.

title: UAT Plugin
description: APM Plugin for User Acceptance Testing orchestration — run_suite, get_results, list_suites actions. Bridges APM to the UAT execution pipeline.

title: Skills Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping SkillsRegistryStore — list_skills, get_skill, health_score, audit, refresh actions. Exposes full skills health scoring and registry management through the plugin API.

title: Ports Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping PortManager — get_port_map, scan_active_ports, detect_clashes, assign_port, suggest_remediation actions. Exposes full port intelligence through the plugin engine.

title: Usage Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping ClaudeUsageStore — summary, record, by_project, all_usage, reset_project actions. Token consumption and effort-level tracking accessible via plugin API.

title: DevOps Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping BackgroundTasksStore, ProjectScanner, and ActionEngine — list_tasks, stop_task, scan_projects, list_actions, run_action actions. Unified DevOps operations surface through the plugin engine.

title: Alerting Plugin
description: APM Plugin wrapping AlertRulesEngine and SloEngine — list_rules, add_rule, enable_rule, evaluate, alert_history, list_slis, error_budget actions. Full SLO/alerting lifecycle through the plugin API.

title: Integration Engine Standard
description: New IntegrationBehaviour contract for external protocol bridges — integration_name/0, protocol/0, connect/1, disconnect/0, status/0, handle_event/3, supervisor_children/0. IntegrationSupervisor DynamicSupervisor. IntegrationRegistry GenServer + ETS.

title: AgentLock Integration
description: Integration wrapping the 3-layer AgentLock authorization pipeline — authorize, summary, list_tools, record_execution actions. Connects to PolicyEngine/TokenStore/RateLimiter/AuthorizationGate via custom protocol.

title: AG-UI Integration
description: Integration bridging APM to the AG-UI open protocol via ag_ui_ex Hex SDK — emit_event, stats, replay_since actions. Translates APM lifecycle events to 33-type AG-UI event model. Protocol: :ag_ui.

title: Session Manager
description: ApmV5.SessionManager GenServer polls ~/Developer/ccem/apm/sessions/*.json every 30s. Enriches sessions with live agents (AgentRegistry), ports (PortManager), plugins (PluginRegistry), and .claude config directory counts. Broadcasts 'apm:sessions' PubSub. The CCEM↔APM connector — links each Claude Code session to its project, agents, and infrastructure.

title: Session Manager LiveView
description: Split-panel LiveView at /sessions and /sessions/:id. Left: session list with active/inactive badges and pulse animation. Right: 5-tab detail panel — Overview (stat cards + metadata), Claude Config (CLAUDE.md preview + memory/skills/hooks counts), Agents, Ports, Plugins. 10s auto-refresh via PubSub subscription to 'apm:sessions'.

title: CCEMHelper Settings
description: SettingsView sheet in CCEMHelper menu bar app. APM URL field with live latency test button. Notification toggles for agent lifecycle, AgentLock approvals, formation events. Launch at Login toggle (SMAppService). Open Dashboard on Connect. All settings persisted via @AppStorage with io.pegues.ccem.* key prefix.

title: CCEMHelper About + Help
description: AboutView: version/build from Bundle.main.infoDictionary, GitHub link to ccem-apm repo, Open APM Dashboard button. HelpView: scrollable Quick Start bullets, Keyboard Shortcuts (monospaced key badges), Troubleshooting items for APM connection, notifications, login item. Footer section in MenuBarView with Settings/About/Help sheet triggers.

title: Agent Descriptor Mapping
description: AgentLockConfig extended with agent descriptor mapping — structured metadata per agent type with human-readable labels, risk profiles, and capability tags. Enables context-aware authorization decisions based on agent identity.

title: Execution Context Payload
description: Execution context payload schema integrated into AgentLock authorization flow. Tool invocations now carry structured context (session, project, formation, parent agent) enabling richer policy evaluation and audit trail correlation.

title: Notification Grouping + ApprovalQueue
description: ApprovalQueue GenServer with debounced notification grouping. Batches rapid-fire AgentLock approval requests into grouped notifications to reduce alert fatigue. Configurable debounce window and group-by-tool coalescing.

title: ApprovalModal UX
description: ApprovalModal titlebar with agent descriptor, keyboard shortcuts (Enter to approve, Escape to reject, Tab to cycle), and dismiss control. Full modal interaction redesign for rapid grouped approval workflows.

title: CCEMHelper Grouped Approval UI
description: CCEMHelper native macOS grouped approval UI with focus management. Approval requests rendered as grouped cards in the menu bar app with keyboard navigation, bulk approve/reject, and per-tool detail expansion. Focus ring management for accessibility.

title: ApprovalAuditLog
description: ApprovalAuditLog GenServer with persistent audit trail for all approval decisions. Records approve/reject/timeout with timestamp, session, agent, tool, and decision context. APM dashboard audit view at /approval-history with filterable log table.

title: AgentLock OpenAPI + Docs
description: OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec updated with AgentLock notification endpoints, approval queue operations, and audit log queries. Full AgentLock documentation section covering descriptor mapping, execution context, grouped approvals, and audit trail.

title: Approval Integration Tests
description: Integration test suite for the full approval workflow: request grouping, modal rendering, keyboard interaction, approve/reject paths, audit log persistence, and CCEMHelper notification delivery. Covers CP-56 through CP-63.

title: osascript Notification Fallback
description: Added osascript fallback for notification delivery on unsigned apps. When UNUserNotificationCenter is unavailable (unsigned builds), CCEMHelper falls back to osascript display notification for ApprovalQueue alerts.

title: Security Hook: Bash Injection Detection
description: Expanded security_reminder_hook.py with Bash command injection detection patterns and advisory-level alerts. Detects dangerous shell patterns (eval, curl|sh, base64 decode piping, env var injection) with critical-block or advisory severity.

title: Security Hook: SSRF Detection
description: WebFetch/WebSearch SSRF detection added to security hook. Blocks requests to IMDS endpoints (169.254.169.254), internal schemes (file://, gopher://), and advises on private IP ranges (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x). Full coverage across WebFetch and WebSearch tool types.

title: Security Hook: Prompt Injection Detection
description: Agent/Skill prompt injection advisory detection. Scans for common injection patterns (ignore previous instructions, system prompt override, role reassignment) in Agent and Skill tool invocations with advisory-level alerts.

title: Security Hook: Expanded Tool Coverage
description: hooks.json matcher expanded to Edit|Write|MultiEdit|Bash|WebFetch|WebSearch|Agent|Skill — 8 native Claude Code tool types covered by security guidance patterns. All copies synced across claude-code-plugins/1.0.0, claude-plugins-official/104d39be10b7, and claude-plugins-official/unknown.

title: SecurityGuidancePlugin
description: First-class :security plugin_scope added to PluginBehaviour. SecurityGuidancePlugin with 4 actions: hook_status (installation state + pattern counts), scan_history (recent debug log entries), covered_tools (8 tool types with severity levels), pattern_summary (category breakdown per tool type). Dashboard widget for security posture overview.

title: Security Plugin Test Suite
description: 41-test ExUnit suite for SecurityGuidancePlugin — contract compliance, endpoint listing, all 4 actions (hook_status, scan_history, covered_tools, pattern_summary), nav integration, dashboard widgets. Full coverage of security plugin lifecycle.
